title: 7 Gold Miners Vanished in a Flooded Cave in Laos
script: 7 gold miners crawled into a cave in Laos and disappeared underground. Flash flooding sealed the entrance while they were inside, trapping them with no way out. For 10 days, an international rescue team — including divers from the famous 2018 Thai cave rescue — raced to reach them. When the water dropped, 5 walked out alive. 2 are still missing.
